creator: se@mi.uni-koeln.de
text:
On 1999-02-11 04:55 -0800, jobaldwi@vt.edu wrote:
> >Description:
> The Wine port failes to patch unless the patch files patch-ap and patch-av are removed.  Once they are gone it builds fine and runs fine, as far as I can tell.

The patches have been removed when I did the commit.

Which method did you use to update the Wine port on
your system ?

Regards, STefan
